use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING ATTENTION DEFICIT HYPERACTIVITY DISORDER

indications.text:
DYANAVEL XR is a central nervous system (CNS) stimulant indicated for the treatment of Attention
Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) [see Clinical Studies (14)].

DYANAVEL XR is indicated for the treatment of Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder
(ADHD) in patients 6 years and older [see Clinical Studies (14)].

DYANAVEL XR is indicated for the treatment of Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) in
patients 6 years and older [see Clinical Studies (14)].

DYANAVEL XR is a central nervous system (CNS) stimulant indicated for the treatment of Attention
Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) [see Clinical Studies (14)].

DYANAVEL XR is indicated for the treatment of Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) in
patients 6 years and older [see Clinical Studies (14)].
